title: Minecraft Valkarath
description: Minecraft Valkarath is a Client-Side Modpack to use on the german medieval roleplay server FTSCraft.
body:
# FTSCraft Client Modpack
This client-side modpack is designed specifically for the FTSCraft server, enhancing the gameplay experience without altering the core mechanics. It includes various quality-of-life improvements, UI enhancements, performance optimizations, and immersive visual tweaks. Whether you're looking for a smoother gameplay experience or additional customization options, this modpack ensures a seamless and enriched journey on FTSCraft.

Let me know if you want any modifications!

## Highlights
- Better **F3**
- Minimap
- Shader
- Performance Boost
- Immersive Roleplay Feeling
- **F7** for Freecam
- **Ä** for Worldmap
